notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Randy Arozarena singles on a ground ball to center fielder Tristan Peters. Julio Rodríguez scores. Josh Naylor to 3rd. Randy Arozarena to 2nd. Fielding error by center fielder Tristan Peters.
